/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/punto-switcher-engine.dir/link.d -shared  -o ../../lib/fcitx5/punto-switcher-engine.so "CMakeFiles/punto-switcher-engine.dir/PuntoModule.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/punto-switcher-engine.dir/InputTracker.cpp.o"  ../core/libpunto-core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libFcitx5Core.so.5.1.14 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libFcitx5Config.so.5.1.14 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libFcitx5Utils.so.5.1.14
